headline: Should You Add NextEra Energy to Your Portfolio Before Q2 Earnings?
summary: NextEra Energy heads into Q2 earnings with rising Florida demand and renewable additions, though valuation and gas-project costs cloud the outlook.

headline: PG&E Gears Up to Report Q2 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
summary: PCG readies to report Q2 earnings as higher electric demand, new rates and lower operating costs are expected to support results.
